items.summary: Update the Shows section to include Breaking Bad and at least 5 other popular TV shows (e.g., The Office, Game of Thrones, Stranger Things, Breaking Bad, The Wire, Peaky Blinders, The Sopranos). Each show card should display a title, cover image or emoji fallback, a short description, and a Watch Now button that loads an official YouTube trailer or highlight embed in the VideoPlayer modal. Update the backend hardcoded shows array to reflect these new entries.

Rebrand the entire site to 'zakariasadeq7site123'. Update the site name in the Navigation logo, HeroSection headline/logo, Footer, and the HTML title tag in index.html so that 'zakariasadeq7site123' appears consistently everywhere 'NexHub' currently appears.

Update the Games section to feature unblocked/proxy-style games inspired by Hypcal and Totally Science. Replace the current game list with at least 6 popular unblocked games such as Slope, 1v1.LOL, Cookie Clicker, Run 3, Drift Hunters, and Retro Bowl, using their publicly accessible embed or iframe URLs. Update the backend hardcoded games array to reflect these new entries (title, description, embed URL, thumbnail URL).
